summary: PopBet iter5 (user-reported bug fixes) — all verified. BUG FIX 1 (remove Google button): Confirmed via UI automation that [data-testid=auth-google-button] is ABSENT on both signup and login tabs, 'Kontynuuj z Google' text and 'lub' divider have 0 occurrences on both tabs. [data-testid=forgot-password-link] still visible on Login tab. Signup → auto-login regression: created fresh user ui_iter5_<ts>@popbet.dev with pw secret123, redirected into /(tabs), Home shows +1000 coins balance, daily-streak card, and market card — no console error re: googleSignIn. BUG FIX 2 (GitHub-clone .env flow): static inspection confirmed /app/frontend/.env.example exists with `EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL=` placeholder + Polish setup comments, /app/frontend/SETUP.md exists (Polish, step-by-step, covers preview URL + emergent.host + local FastAPI + known gotchas), /app/.gitignore line 85 has `!.env.example` whitelist (with `.env`/`*.env` blocked lines 83/84/86), /app/frontend/src/api/client.ts exports HAS_BACKEND_URL (line 6) and assertBackend() throws Polish 'Brak adresu backendu. Utwórz plik frontend/.env...' message (line 25-32), /app/frontend/app/index.tsx renders full-screen setup guide with testID='missing-backend-url-screen' + emoji + 3-step card (cp .env.example .env / set EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL / npx expo start --clear) when HAS_BACKEND_URL is false. Preview env has EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL set correctly so the guard screen is not runtime-triggered — verified only by static inspection as instructed. Backend regression: 14/14 iter4 + 18/18 iter2 = 32/32 all green.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning 'shadow* style props are deprecated. Use boxShadow.' still emitted on every screen load. Carry-over from iter2/iter3/iter4. Reference: /app/frontend/src/theme/colors.ts.
Console warning 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents'. Reference: /app/frontend/app/onboarding.tsx reward overlay (line 320). Carry-over from iter2.

action_items: (Nice-to-have, persists 4 iterations) Migrate deprecated shadow* → boxShadow in /app/frontend/src/theme/colors.ts.
(Nice-to-have, persists 4 iterations) Move pointerEvents='none' from prop to style in /app/frontend/app/onboarding.tsx reward overlay.

(Optional) The runtime guard screen in /app/frontend/app/index.tsx cannot be tested without unsetting EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL in the preview env (would break every other test). Consider a `?forceMissingBackend=1` query flag for QA if this ever regresses, but not required — static inspection confirms it's wired correctly.

(Optional) loginWithGoogle is still exposed on AuthContext (AuthContext.tsx:25,95,121) even though the UI entry point was removed. Fine per problem statement (kept for future re-enable), but a comment `// TODO: re-enable when Google auth is re-wired` next to line 25 would help future maintainers.
critical_code_review_comments: /app/frontend/.env.example (12): sets `EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL=https://your-backend.example.com` as an obviously-placeholder URL — good, won't be mistaken for a working default.
/app/.gitignore ordering (83-86): `.env` and `*.env` are blocked, then `!.env.example` un-ignores it — order is correct so the whitelist wins.
/app/frontend/src/api/client.ts (5-6): trims trailing slashes AND checks !!BASE_URL for HAS_BACKEND_URL — handles both undefined and whitespace-only env values.
/app/frontend/src/api/client.ts (25-32,35,45,63): assertBackend() is called in every request path (apiGet, apiPost, apiRequest) — cannot be bypassed.
/app/frontend/app/index.tsx (13-37): setup guide uses SafeAreaView + ScrollView so it survives keyboard/small-screen without overflow; testID='missing-backend-url-screen' is stable for QA.
/app/frontend/app/onboarding.tsx: no residual `Kontynuuj z Google` / `lub` markup. Verified via grep + runtime DOM count (0 occurrences on both tabs).
/app/frontend/SETUP.md: covers both Emergent-deployed backend AND local FastAPI+MongoDB fallback (with LAN-IP gotcha for Expo Go). Good docs.

success_rate.frontend: 100% — Google button absence verified on both signup+login tabs, 'lub' divider verified absent, forgot-password-link still visible, signup→auto-login→tabs still works end-to-end. Static inspection of index.tsx guard screen + client.ts HAS_BACKEND_URL/assertBackend + .env.example + SETUP.md + .gitignore whitelist all confirmed.

seed_data_creation: One throwaway UI signup: ui_iter5_<unix_ts>@popbet.dev / secret123. Backend tests use per-test TEST_iter4_<uuid>@popbet.dev users (unchanged from iter4).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter5 was a bug-fix pass (no new features). All 32 backend regression tests still green — reuse /app/backend/tests/test_popbet_iter4.py and test_popbet_iter2.py. UI: onboarding.tsx has no Google references; loginWithGoogle is retained in AuthContext for future re-enable per problem statement. Preview .env has EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL set, so /app/frontend/app/index.tsx's missing-backend-url-screen is only reachable if that var is unset — verify via static inspection. shadow*/pointerEvents deprecation warnings persist (4 iterations now, main agent knows).
rca_of_issue: N/A — user-reported bugs (network-fails-after-github-clone + emergent branding leak on Google button) were both correctly fixed by the main agent: (a) .env.example + SETUP.md + gitignore whitelist + HAS_BACKEND_URL guard, (b) removed Google button + divider from onboarding. Both fixes verified working.
